input: Assess quality maturity for our e-commerce platform
expected_behavior: Produces S1 maturity assessment scoring 6 dimensions (0-100% each), overall maturity level (1-5), 12-month target, gap analysis, DORA benchmark comparison, and prioritized quick wins.

input: Design a test strategy for our microservices architecture
expected_behavior: Selects Test Diamond shape (Unit 20% / Integration 40% / Contract 30% / E2E 10%), defines all test types with owners and frequency, includes contract testing recommendation (Pact), and test data strategy with synthetic generation.

input: Set up quality gates for our CI/CD pipeline
expected_behavior: Defines 5 pipeline stages (Commit/PR/Nightly/Release/Production) with specific tests, timeouts, pass criteria, and failure actions. Includes gate enforcement rules: no bypass for security, flaky test policy, timeout = fail.

input: Define quality metrics and dashboard for engineering leadership
expected_behavior: Produces S5 with leading indicators (coverage, PR review time, build stability, flaky rate) and lagging indicators (production incidents, escaped defects, MTTR, regression rate) with targets. Dashboard design with 4 panels.

input: Introduce shift-left practices for a legacy Java monolith with no tests
expected_behavior: Recommends Golden Master / characterization tests before refactoring, smoke tests on critical paths first (20-30 cases), test pyramid shape for monolith (Unit 55% / Integration 25% / API 15% / E2E 5%), phased implementation plan starting with foundations (weeks 1-4).
